datasync.task.deleted.CfnAbout: The reporting level for the deleted section of your DataSync task report.

datasync.task.deleted.ReportLevel.Description: Specifies whether you want your task report to include only what went wrong with your transfer or a list of what succeeded and didn't.  +  `ERRORS_ONLY`: A report shows what DataSync was unable to delete.+  `SUCCESSES_AND_ERRORS`: A report shows what DataSync was able and unable to delete.
